$Comment: 1.1.0 flagship native-asset-first DEMO: a Combat Action Evaluator that fires the native MMO_Dodge RootInteraction as a SELF-targeted Ability action. The periodic-cast cadence is the EVALUATOR-level RunConditions gate below: a TimeSinceLastUsed condition whose utility ramps Linearly 0->1 over the 16s XRange since the evaluator itself last ran this action, so the MinRunUtility 0.5 threshold opens the gate at roughly the XRange midpoint, ~8 seconds. (The Dodge action carries no per-action TimeSinceLastUsed condition - a redundant one there would just re-gate the same clock a second time.) The engine additionally imposes its own hardcoded ~2s minimum between repeats of a self-targeted Ability action via CombatSupport's attackPause, so a much shorter XRange would still be floored at ~2s regardless of what this JSON says. This periodic-cast cadence lives entirely in this JSON, zero Java. Modeled on the vanilla Server/NPC/Balancing/Intelligent/CAE_Goblin_Scavenger_Sword.json shape. Wired to the additive Server/NPC/Roles/MmoMobScaling/Mmoscaling_Caster_Demo.json role only - nothing vanilla references this asset. Delete both files to remove the demo.

Dodge.Description: Periodically dodge in place to demonstrate a native, Java-free caster cadence

Conditions.$Comment: Schema-REQUIRED (a null Conditions list fails asset validation, boot-verified 2026-07-15). Effectively-always-eligible jitter; the real ~8s cadence stays on the evaluator-level RunConditions gate above. ENGINE CONSTRAINT (world-crash-verified 2026-07-15): RandomiserCondition.calculateUtility calls ThreadLocalRandom.nextDouble(MinValue, MaxValue), which throws IllegalArgumentException when MinValue >= MaxValue and KILLS THE WORLD THREAD every evaluator tick (incl. on world LOAD while the NPC is saved). MinValue must be STRICTLY less than MaxValue; the codec validates only the 0..1 range, not the ordering.
